checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View is only allowed when project is active, user is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role, and respective role constraints are met

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit is only allowed when project is active, user is in ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator role, and respective role constraints are met

checks.name: export_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Export is only allowed when project is active, user is in correct role, role constraints are met, and device is compliant for all roles

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when user department does not match project managing department, unless user is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when user department does not match project managing department, unless user is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_dept_block_export
checks.description: Export is forbidden when user department does not match project managing department, unless user is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_edit
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_pi_edit
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_cr_export
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, active project, non-HighlyRestricted doc, compliant device MUST be able to Export

checks.name: floor_pi_export
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, active project MUST be able to Export

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_export
checks.description: Export policy is not trivially deny-all
